compiled_state.title: REBAR_MCP_READONLY=TRUE (uppercase) silently disables the readonly gate
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Summary
REBAR_MCP_READONLY=TRUE (or True/YES) silently disables the readonly gate — the membership test is case-sensitive.

## Reproduction Steps
(verified on installed 0.4.0 == HEAD)
1. REBAR_MCP_READONLY=TRUE; build_server().
2. list_tools() -> all 14 write tools exposed.

## Expected vs Actual
- Expected: common truthy spellings enable the gate; an operator setting TRUE believes the server is read-only.
- Actual: mcp_server.py:115-116 tests membership in ("1","true","yes") without .lower(); TRUE fails open (the dangerous direction).

## Source
- src/rebar/mcp_server.py:115-116 (_readonly)
- src/rebar/mcp_server.py:271-273 — REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE uses the same parse; its failure direction is safe (stricter) but fix both for consistency.

## Fix direction
.strip().lower() before the membership test in one tiny _env_truthy helper used by both checks.

## Suggested RED test
Parametrize TRUE/True/YES/Yes/1/yes/true -> all readonly (write tools hidden); ""/0/no -> not readonly.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Case-insensitive truthy parse for REBAR_MCP_READONLY and REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE
- [ ] RED parametrized test first
- [ ] Documented accepted values in README/CLAUDE.md

comments.body:
IMPLEMENTATION NOTES (experimentally validated in sandbox, 2026-06-09):
Validated: .strip().lower() in _readonly() and on the REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE check. Matrix validated: 1/true/TRUE/True/YES/yes/" true " all gate (17 tools vs 31); 0/unset don't; ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE=TRUE/True/1 all enable, bogus doesn't. test_mcp.py + test_surface.py: 11 passed.
COMPANION FIX validated in the same patch (bug tell-cur-bundle / f6f6): in the fsck tool, `if recover and _readonly(): raise ValueError("fsck recover=True is a write operation and is disabled: this server is read-only (REBAR_MCP_READONLY)")` — engine never called under any truthy READONLY spelling.
COORDINATION: if bug said-stilt-brow (9d7c) lands first, its reconcile rewrite already lowercases ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE — only _readonly() + fsck remain here.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
